title: Shinji Ikari Raising Project PC game translation
display_title: Shinji Ikari Raising Project PC game translation
wikitext:
[]: Shinji Ikari Raising Project PC game translation? Post by Ili3kca3k » Tue Jan 18, 2011 9:30 pm Anyone know of a translation? I just got the game and and well... I don't think I can read Japanese.

[]: Post by The Forgotten Knight » Tue Jan 18, 2011 10:47 pm Have you tried your local bookstore or Amazon? Dark Horse is publishing this series in english already. We're up to volume 7 already. Turns out there's a thread for the manga it's just not spelled in english. They should really fix that. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3039

[]: Post by Ili3kca3k » Tue Jan 18, 2011 10:49 pm I was talking about the game that come out back in 2004 on PC. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion:_Shinji_Ikari_Raising_Project And. XD I just bought the first volume of the manga off amazon a few hours ago.

[]: Post by Guilt & Innocence » Wed Jan 19, 2011 4:57 pm currently there seems to be no translation guide or patch. Your gonna either have to do trial and error or learn Japanese. Or return it if you can. It seems like it is a very unpopular game in the raising project series too.

[]: Post by Ili3kca3k » Wed Jan 19, 2011 5:25 pm Ah. XD Do any of them have English translations?

[]: Post by Guilt & Innocence » Wed Jan 19, 2011 9:13 pm I think the only one with a fan translation is Girlfriend of steel 1

[]: Post by Ili3kca3k » Wed Jan 19, 2011 9:26 pm Aww well that sucks. xD But thanks for your help

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 19, 2011 9:30 pm Uh, we have a thread on this already, there are a few translations in there. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5018 The whole game wasn't translated no, but there are FAQs on various things. Use search next time please. Feel free to read (then post) in the other thread.
